summary: Both REQ-1 (HP preservation on character select) and REQ-2 (attack tick rate constants) appear to be implemented in the diff. REQ-2 is clearly implemented with named constants in combatEngine.ts. REQ-1 is implemented via saving HP to the backend before navigating away in App.tsx's handleBackToCharacterSelect, and the backend's setHp endpoint supports it. No significant missing requirements or hallucinated features were found.
